# form-header

## Import

```typescript
import { FormHeaderComponent } from '@lucca-front/ng/form-header';
```

## API Reference

### FormHeaderComponent (component)

**Selector:** `lu-form-header]`

#### Inputs

| Property | Binding name | Type | Default | Required | Transform | Description |
|----------|-------------|------|---------|----------|-----------|-------------|
| `headingLevel` | `headingLevel` | `1 \| 2 \| 3 \| 4 \| 5 \| 6` | `1` | — | — | — |
